text.t: цена = цена за пруток + стоимость обрезиневани

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: заменить на справочник ширины ремней
